events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a panelboard installation at the "rough-complete" stage. The photos show the current checkpoint scope is finished, with only cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work remaining outside the checkpoint. No component conditions are flagged. References are NEC Art. 408, 110.26, and 200.4.

This seems like a pass scenario - the work is rough-complete, no defects mentioned, remaining work is cleanup/labeling/finish outside the checkpoint.
